lines.speaker: Baker
lines.text: Good day [Sir/Madame]. Would you like some nice freshly baked bread? Or perhaps a nice piece of cake?

sections.title: Catching the player trying to steal from a bakery stall

lines.speaker: Baker
lines.text: Hey! Get your hands off there!

sections.title: Interacting with him after stealing from a bakery stall recently

lines.speaker: Baker
lines.text: You're the one who stole something from me!

lines.speaker: Baker
lines.text: Good day, Monsieur. Would you like ze nice freshly-baked bread? Or perhaps a nice piece of cake?
